Bash(cd "/Users/laurenskosters/Downloads/Project SynthCode/SyntCode Design" && python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import math

# Create 1024x1024 icon with dark rounded rect background
size = 1024
img = Image.new\('RGBA', \(size, size\), \(0, 0, 0, 0\)\)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)

# Draw rounded rectangle background \(#1C1B18 dark\)
radius = int\(size * 0.22\)
bg_color = \(28, 27, 24, 255\)
draw.rounded_rectangle\([0, 0, size-1, size-1], radius=radius, fill=bg_color\)

# Load and composite the logo on top, padded
logo = Image.open\('public/logo.png'\).convert\('RGBA'\)
# Pad the logo to ~60% of icon size
logo_size = int\(size * 0.58\)
logo = logo.resize\(\(logo_size, logo_size\), Image.LANCZOS\)
offset = \(size - logo_size\) // 2
img.paste\(logo, \(offset, offset\), logo\)

img.save\('public/icon.png'\)
print\('Created icon.png', img.size\)
" 2>&1 || echo "Pillow not available, trying sips approach")
